promotionTrigger: Add tenant:isolation guard mode to required gates in the PR that introduces the organizations table or the first domain-table organization_id tenant column. Promote to enforce mode only in the PR that completes the full tenant-owned schema, RLS policies, and executable scenario assertions for the staging restrictive fixture.

expectedTenantBoundaryTables.rlsDecision: RLS is intentionally deferred for organizations in NC-E2-02 because the table is the tenant boundary itself and has no organization_id discriminator. Runtime authorization helpers must not expose organization enumeration routes in this slice. Tenant-owned membership rows are RLS-protected through org_memberships.organization_id; organization read policy belongs to the tenant selection/admin-console authorization slice.

expectedTenantOwnedTables.rlsDecision: NC-TB-01 creates the default care-site branch boundary and indexes organization_id. RLS policies and branch authorization scenarios remain NC-TB-03.
NC-TB-01 adds nullable ownership columns and backfills only. RLS policies and enforcement remain NC-TB-03.

deferredTenantTables.reason: Needs explicit tenant/platform audit scope discriminator before staging restrictive RLS tests include admin activity.

requiredIsolationScenarios.description: Organization A admin cannot read Organization B tenant-owned rows.
Organization A cannot create or update rows owned by Organization B.
Wrong-tenant request, patient, visit, audit, payment authorization, and facility access attempts fail.
A shared nurse cannot expose or infer another organization's data through tenant-scoped surfaces.
Platform-admin cross-tenant access is explicit and audited, not ordinary tenant-policy bypass.
Consecutive tenant-scoped requests that reuse one physical connection do not retain prior tenant context.
assertionRefs: packages/database/src/tenant-context.db.test.ts#does not leak sequential tenant contexts on one physical connection

roleGuardrails.description: Production-like startup, health, or migration-runner path must call assertRlsConnectionRoleReady before production RLS enforcement.
